Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}It looks rather busy... Aigis, be sure not to stray too far from us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 156 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Are my words even registering to you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Yes. With the amount of data there is to collect here, I cannot help taking time to process.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I see. So you wish to restrain me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Be warned that my ability to jettison my hand from my wrist would make holding it a poor method of restraint.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Fine, fine... Just make sure to stay close to us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}This is takoyaki. Would you like to try some?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Shopkeep. I would like to purchase one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}"Shopkeep"...? Um, got it, coming right up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Well, aren't you a lucky guy with two beautiful ladies. I'll throw in an extra for ya, on the house![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}"On the house"...? Do the takoyaki have some kind of architectural purpose?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Ah! Extremely high-temperature juices have spurted out from inside.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I'm glad you're enjoying it. Looks as though you've had another valuable experience.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Show Aigis the true nature of takoyaki.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Those are masks. They're worn over the face as a form of recreation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}One can find enjoyment by hiding one's face?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Hiding your face isn't the objective, exactly. Rather, you get to experience having a different one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Hm... Putting this into words is proving difficult...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}So then, by wearing a different face, you are able to become a different version of yourself?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Yes, that's about right. Your degree of comprehension is actually quite stunning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}At this rate, a few more tests and the chairman may give you permission to go out on your own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Hey there, ladies! Wanna try your hand at a lucky draw?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Можете створити гарні спогади, еге? Шанси виглядають добренько — залишилося багато виграшних квитків![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Коробка наповнена[n]трикутними лотерейними квитками...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Ого! Вам щастить сьогодні! Виграли з першої спроби![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Ось ваш приз. Насолоджуйтеся![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}（アイテム名）を受け取った。[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Ого! Вам щастить сьогодні! Виграли з першої спроби![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Ось ваш приз. Насолоджуйтеся![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}（アイテム名）を受け取った。[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Between this and my onboard firearms, which is more effective in combat against the Shadows?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 156 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}In exchange, I'll give you these marbles I won.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Well, I think we've seen all the vendors now. It's starting to get late, so let's head back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Not yet. The mystery of the shooting game is yet unsolved.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}I precisely struck the item to unbalance its center of gravity, yet it did not even budge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}...Perhaps you should ask Iori the trick behind it when we return.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ми вирішили повернутися до гуртожитку.[n]{f 1 1}
